properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: DataFrame) -> DataFrame:

metadata.label: dynamic_column_selection
metadata.comment: Facilitates the selection of specific columns from a dataset based on their data types or custom expressions, enhancing data analysis flexibility.

metadata.label: unpivot_customer_data
metadata.comment: Transforms customer data for better analysis by restructuring it into a more accessible format.

metadata.label: reformat_to_json
metadata.comment: Transforms customer data into a structured JSON format for easier data interchange and integration.

expression.expression:
to_json(
  STRUCT(
    customer_id_final AS customer_id_final, 
    account_flags AS account_flags, 
    country_code AS country_code, 
    var_col_name AS var_col_name, 
    var_col_value AS var_col_value))

metadata.label: json_column_parser
metadata.comment: Parses JSON data from a specified column to make it more accessible for analysis.

metadata.label: data_cleansing_operations
metadata.comment: Cleanses and standardizes customer data, ensuring accuracy and consistency across key fields.

metadata.label: bulk_column_casting
metadata.comment: Converts customer IDs to a standardized integer format while retaining other data columns for consistency in analysis.

metadata.label: bulk_rename_columns
metadata.comment: Renames specific columns in a dataset to enhance clarity and organization, improving data management and usability.
